underlying_goal: Fix YouTube Shorts exclusion bug so videos actually download in their jellyfin-downloader app
friction_detail: Claude's grep-based verification plan was flawed (matching 'match-title' instead of 'match-filter'), and Claude repeatedly failed to diagnose deployment issues correctly, frustrating the user.
brief_summary: User wanted to fix a Shorts exclusion bug preventing video downloads; the code fix was made but deployment verification was botched and the user remained frustrated.
